mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_data (device_id, temperature, vibration, pressure, status, cumulative_energy, collect_time) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{temperature}, #{vibration}, #{pressure}, #{status}, #{cumulativeEnergy}, #{collectTime})

INSERT INTO device_data (device_id, temperature, vibration, pressure, status, cumulative_energy, collect_time) VALUES
(#{d.deviceId}, #{d.temperature}, #{d.vibration}, #{d.pressure}, #{d.status}, #{d.cumulativeEnergy}, #{d.collectTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
